posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Exciting announcement alert!
Have you ever dreamed about working for monday.com?
Do you thrive off providing other users with solutions in the community?
Are you a monday.com platform whizz?

Well, your dreams may be about to come true. We are looking for a new Community Manager and want to extend this opportunity to YOU, our community members.

For more information about the role, including how to apply, click here: /#/t/27424
